mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO forum_post_favorite (post_id, volunteer_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{volunteerId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM forum_post_favorite WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM forum_post_favorite WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM forum_post_favorite WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}

SELECT fpf.id, fpf.post_id AS postId, fp.title AS postTitle, fc.name AS postCategory, fp.status AS postStatus, fpf.volunteer_id AS volunteerId, v.real_name AS volunteerName, v.phone AS volunteerPhone, v.email AS volunteerEmail, fpf.created_at AS favoriteTime FROM forum_post_favorite fpf LEFT JOIN forum_post fp ON fpf.post_id = fp.id LEFT JOIN forum_category fc ON fp.category_id = fc.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON fpf.volunteer_id = v.id ORDER BY fpf.created_at DESC
